name: resume-tailor
description: ATS-optimized resume tailoring skill. Multi-stage workflow for job-specific resume optimization, ATS scoring, and DOCX generation.

interface.shortDescription: Tailor resumes to job descriptions with ATS scoring
interface.longDescription: Analyze a resume and job description, identify match gaps, ask strategic positioning questions, generate an ATS-optimized resume draft, and optionally produce a cover letter and DOCX output.
defaultPrompt: Tailor my resume for this job.
Score my resume against a JD.
